More temples will be attacked.

 why Indians astrologically need to travel abroad to make
money
-?
Recently I was reading economic times paper and saw a article that south indians
especially the state of tamil nadu, kerela and andhra pradesh have record number of people
traveling abroad to work . it is also true for the state of karnatka. The article also
